notableEvents.label: Tyler Stephenson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Will Benson out at 2nd. Tyler Stephenson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Spencer Steer.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Lane Thomas.

notableEvents.label: Edwin Arroyo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Edwin Arroyo called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Spencer Steer.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas lines out to center fielder Blake Dunn.
